title: ctenodon simplicifolius
intro: Ctenodon simplicifolius, also known as the Simple-leaved Ctenodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Ctenodon simplicifolius is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions.
